title: onobrychis crista-galli var. trilophocarpa
intro: Onobrychis crista-galli var. trilophocarpa, also known as sainfoin, is a perennial legume native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of sainfoin include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and eczema, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Sainfoin can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
